scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:api && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:driver && npm run build:h5 && npm run build:merchant && npm run build:react-admin
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:admin && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:admin && npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:driver && npm run lint:h5 && npm run lint:merchant && npm run lint:react-admin
scripts.clean: rm -rf mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-admin-vue/dist mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-api-node/build mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-frontend-vue/dist mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-driver-vue/dist mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-h5-vue/dist mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-merchant-vue/dist mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-admin-react/dist
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-api-node && npm run install --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-admin-vue && npm run install --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-frontend-vue && npm run install --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-driver-vue && npm run install --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-h5-vue && npm run install --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-merchant-vue && npm run install --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-admin-react
scripts.update:all: npm update && npm run update --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-api-node && npm run update --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-admin-vue && npm run update --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-frontend-vue && npm run update --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-driver-vue && npm run update --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-h5-vue && npm run update --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-merchant-vue && npm run update --workspace=mixmlaal-apps/mixmlaal-admin-react
